acceptance_targets: [chapter_10_dialogue_001] PASS if, at the revised equivalents of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:343, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:409, Lucien uses contractions in at least two of the three lines and each line names a concrete present fact in the room or between the bodies rather than offering a generalized diagnosis or maxim. FAIL if any of those beats still reads like therapist talk or a quotable aphorism.

[chapter_10_prose_001] PASS if no more than one of the revised equivalents of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:321, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:333 keeps the paired-negation frame, and at least two of the three lines use affirmative, concrete description tied to the immediate action or sensation. FAIL if two or more of those beats still rely on the same "not X, not Y" construction.

[FBR-002] Reading snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3064-3068, the room's reaction should register through concrete quarry-specific detail rather than a stock stillness phrase. Fail if the revised beat can still be summarized as 'the room went still' without losing anything material.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, at the revised equivalents of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:343, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:409, Lucien uses contractions in at least two of the three lines and each line names a concrete present fact in the room or between the bodies rather than offering a generalized diagnosis or maxim. FAIL if any of those beats still reads like therapist talk or a quotable aphorism.
findings.problem: Lucien's private-scene dialogue slips into psychologizing aphorism and one unnecessary full-form construction ("I would like"), which breaks the style-bible brief for a moderate-contraction, sensuous-but-plain schoolmaster. In the middle of an exhausted quarry-floor encounter, these lines sound composed from above rather than spoken under strain.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:343, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:409, replace the abstract diagnosis and maxim with language tied to the immediate room: breath, shoulder pain, the false name, fear, the wall, the cough, or the fact of choosing each other anyway. Keep Lucien's dry wit, but make him plainer under stress and use contractions unless emphasis is doing real work.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than one of the revised equivalents of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:321, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:333 keeps the paired-negation frame, and at least two of the three lines use affirmative, concrete description tied to the immediate action or sensation. FAIL if two or more of those beats still rely on the same "not X, not Y" construction.
findings.problem: The chapter reuses the same paired-negation descriptor shape three times in pivotal moments ("not warm, not cold..." / "not gentle, not rough..." / "not pushing, not restraining..."). What reads as controlled precision once becomes a visible prose tic by the third use, flattening the chapter's strongest emotional beats into the same sentence music.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast at least two of the sentences anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:321, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:333 into positive, scene-specific description. Name what Lucien's look or hand actually does in those beats instead of defining it by what it is not.

findings.acceptance_test: Reading snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3064-3068, the room's reaction should register through concrete quarry-specific detail rather than a stock stillness phrase. Fail if the revised beat can still be summarized as 'the room went still' without losing anything material.
findings.problem: This chapter participates in a full-book reaction-image pattern that appears across six late chapters: the prose defaults to people or rooms 'going still' or 'going flat' instead of inventing a fresh response image. Here, `The room went still` is a generic placeholder rather than a chapter-specific beat, and it starts to make the book's pressure scenes feel copy-edited to the same template.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the beat at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3064-3068 with a reaction specific to this room, this accusation, and this quarry. Keep the hush and attention, but render them through local change: rope creak stopping, water drip suddenly over-audible, Abel's breath, Clemence's lamp hand, copper scrape still ringing in the passage. Do not use `went still`, `went flat`, or a close equivalent facial-stillness shortcut here; reserve the strongest version of that pattern elsewhere in the book.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the contradiction that tenderness can coexist with surveillance, desire with betrayal, and ideology with vanity. Render violence, sex, illness, and poverty at the scale characters actually experience them. When an edge case appears, choose the more specific and less reputationally safe version if it remains faithful to character, period, and causality.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches bodily danger, sex, grief, class shame, or political cruelty and then retreats into summary, rewrite toward the exact physical and social fact the character cannot evade.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: Moderate to high; contractions are the spoken default, with full forms reserved for period formality, deliberate emphasis, or Vautrin's cultivated precision.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressive surveillance chapters with slower communal or reflective chapters; vary scene count, dialogue density, and whether the turn comes from action, information, dread, or aftermath so no two adjacent chapters run on the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Historically grounded and unsentimental; plain enough for labor and bureaucracy, lyrical only when perception earns it rather than rhetoric.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third centered on Elise, elastic enough to register class texture, political pressure, and the quarry's collective life without drifting into authorial essay.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, image-bearing sentences broken by hard factual beats at moments of violence, lust, bureaucratic coercion, or shame.
